description.content: Operations for managing Sendbird users.
Retrieves a list of users registered in the Sendbird application. Supports pagination and filtering by nickname.

query.description: Pagination token for the next page.
Maximum number of users to return (1-100).
Whether to include bot users in results.
Comma-separated list of user IDs to filter.
Filter users whose nickname starts with this value.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Your Sendbird application ID

The Sendbird Platform API provides server-side access to manage users, channels, messages, and moderation for in-app chat applications built on Sendbird. Supports group channels, open channels, direct messages, push notifications, and webhooks for real-time communication features.

Contact Support:
 Name: Sendbird Support
